meaning: n.(伊斯兰教国家元老,高官)维齐尔
examples: And do you also, o prudent Vizier, forget it.
Second one is on the relationship of the vizier and the royal power.
And now, O excellent Vizier, the excess of my paternal anxiety inclines me to sleep.
"I'm not some grand vizier in my office doodling, " notes Gehry.
Indeed, running a big American firm or a Silicon Valley start-up is now riskier than being grand vizier in the court of the Ottoman sultan.
